layout_description:
Option: OPT-1
Slide description: TWO-COLUMN LAYOUT with 2:1 width allocation (left column dominant). The slide uses a clean, professional structure with the title at the top, followed by two side-by-side content containers that fill the remaining vertical space. The left container (Context) receives approximately 65% of the horizontal space to accommodate dense multi-paragraph content, while the right container (Objectives) receives approximately 30% for a compact numbered list. A small gutter (5%) separates the two columns. Both containers share identical top and bottom edges, creating strong horizontal alignment. The layout maximizes vertical space utilization — containers extend from just below the title to near the slide bottom, leaving only minimal safe-area margins. No decorative bottom layer is needed as the content containers fill the slide confidently. Reading flow is natural: title → left column (primary context) → right column (supporting objectives).

Blueprint:
  Orientation: left-to-right
  Regions: 2
  Allocation: [0.65, 0.3]

Containers:
  C0 (LEFT COLUMN — Context Section): This container holds the primary narrative content describing the Liquidity Solutions business context and ATLAS technology development. It occupies the left two-thirds of the slide body (split 2:1 with the right column). The container has no visible border or background fill — content sits directly on the white slide background for a clean, open feel. The section begins with a bold section header 'Context' in brand primary color, left-aligned at the top. Below the header, content is organized as a vertical stack of bullet points using native PowerPoint bullets with brand-color circular bullet markers. The text is body font, brand text color, left-aligned with standard bullet indentation. Content density is high (7 major bullets with nested sub-bullets), so padding is minimal — just enough to prevent crowding. Bullets are distributed evenly across the full vertical height of the container using flexGrow on each bullet section, ensuring no dead space accumulates at the bottom. Key phrases within bullets (dates, monetary values, technology names) are rendered in bold for emphasis. The container's left edge aligns to the slide's left safe-area margin; its right edge stops at approximately 65% of slide width to leave room for the objectives column. Top and bottom edges align exactly with the right column container to maintain horizontal row integrity.
  C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — Objectives Section): This container holds a compact numbered list of three meeting objectives. It occupies the right third of the slide body (split 1:2 with the left column). The container has no visible border or background fill — content sits directly on the white slide background, matching the treatment of the left column. The section begins with a bold section header 'Objectives' in brand primary color, left-aligned at the top. Below the header, content is organized as a numbered list (1, 2, 3) using native PowerPoint numbering with brand-color numbers. Each objective is a short text block (1–2 lines) in body font, brand text color, left-aligned. The three objectives are distributed evenly across the full vertical height of the container using equal flexGrow values on each numbered item section, ensuring vertical rhythm matches the left column's distribution. Thin dashed grey horizontal separator lines span the full column width between objectives (not after the last one), creating visual rhythm and reinforcing the equal-weight structure of the three items. The container's left edge starts at approximately 70% of slide width (5% gutter from the left column's right edge); its right edge aligns to the slide's right safe-area margin. Top and bottom edges align exactly with the left column container, creating a unified two-column row structure. Font size matches the left column body text exactly (within-slide font uniformity rule C6).
  SC-BOTTOM (DECORATIVE BOTTOM LAYER — Inactive): Not active. The slide is well-filled by the two content containers, which confidently occupy the available vertical space. No visual grouping or background fill is needed. The content containers sit directly on the white slide background.
  SC-TOP (OVERLAY CONNECTOR LAYER — Inactive): Not active. No cross-container connectors, arrows, or overlay elements are needed. All content is self-contained within its respective column.

_reference_violations.description: C1 (Objectives): text block occupies approximately 30-35% of container inner height — severely under-filled. More than half the container is empty white space below the third objective.

C0 (Context): text block occupies approximately 50-55% of container inner height — moderately under-filled. A clearly visible empty band exists at the bottom of the container below the last bullet point.

_reference_critique:
C1 (Objectives): text block occupies ~30-35% of container height — severely under-filled. The three numbered objectives plus their separators occupy less than 40% of the available vertical space, leaving more than half the container empty below objective 3. SVGSketcher must increase body font size from current size (appears to be ~11-12pt) toward 18pt (ceiling) until text fills at least 65% of the container. Apply the same font size to C0 body text to preserve within-slide uniformity (C6). Additionally, increase vertical spacing between objectives (flexGrow distribution) to better utilize the full container height.

C0 (Context): text block occupies ~50-55% of container height — moderately under-filled. A clearly visible empty band exists at the bottom of the container below the last bullet point. SVGSketcher must increase body font size (matching the new size applied to C1 per uniformity rule C6) and ensure bullet sections use flexGrow to distribute evenly across the full vertical height, eliminating the dead space at the bottom.
